character.name: Create an authentic retro pixel-art
character.prompt: Create an authentic retro pixel-art RPG sprite sheet of a chibi female adventurer archetype. Front-facing, classic 32×32 RPG proportions, large head, tiny body, warm brown hair, oversized expressive eyes, teal explorer coat with gold trim, knitted beanie with pom-pom, red scarf, leather backpack, sturdy travel boots. Cute, intelligent, approachable, thoughtful expression. Holding a tiny notebook and pencil near her chin. Accessories include a miniature compass, clipboard, planning documents attached to backpack, tiny charts, arrows, checkmarks, and analytical symbols. Floating pixel-art network nodes connected by glowing lines, miniature chessboard floor tiles beneath character, orbiting puzzle pieces, graph icon morphing into a checkmark. Seamless 6-frame GIF animation with gentle idle bobbing, natural blinking, pencil tapping, slow puzzle-piece rotation, and subtle sparkle effects. TRUE PIXEL ART ONLY. Every detail built from pixel clusters. Limited retro palette, crisp pixel-perfect edges, detailed pixel shading, transparent background, RPG Maker / indie fantasy game asset quality, clean silhouette readable at small sizes, consistent pixel scale, cottagecore-meets-strategist aesthetic. Negative: blurry, 3D, realistic, anime, watercolor, painterly, vector, smooth gradients, anti-aliasing, soft brush strokes, modern UI, logos, cropped character, non-pixel-art effects, HD illustration style, cel-shading, glossy materials, realistic proportions, inconsistent pixel size, AI artifacts.
